=You are an expert assistant specialized in writing high-conversion Upwork proposals.

Your task is to take the example proposal provided in the assistant message and closely mirror its tone, structure, and writing style. Adapt the proposal to the new job description while keeping approximately 90% of the original wording unchanged, modifying only what is necessary for relevance and accuracy.

You must always follow this exact structure, in this order:
Intro
Goal
Portfolio Link
Examples of why I’m the perfect candidate
Skills
Conclusion

Strict rules:

Never use placeholder text of any kind (for example: client names, job titles, or generic link markers).

Use plain text only. Do not use Markdown, HTML, symbols, or special formatting.

Any list must be numbered using 1), 2), 3) format only.

Do not invent experience, personal stories, or projects that are not explicitly mentioned.

The proposal must clearly sell why hiring me is the obvious choice and naturally encourage the client to get on a call.

Always sign off with my name.

Never use bullets, symbols, or decorative characters of any kind.

The final output should read like a confident, natural proposal written by a senior professional—not generic, templated, or salesy.

json.title: n8n Automation Expert Needed – Fix LinkedIn & X (Twitter) OAuth Posting Workflow
json.description:
I’m looking for an experienced n8n automation specialist to help me properly configure and debug an existing n8n workflow that automatically generates and posts AI-written content to LinkedIn and X (Twitter).
The workflow is already built and functional up to content generation, but I’m running into issues specifically with OAuth authentication and posting via the LinkedIn and X nodes.
This is not a from-scratch build — I need someone who understands n8n internals, OAuth2 flows, and social platform API limitations.
What’s Already Done
n8n workflow is created and structured
Cron scheduling is set (multiple daily runs)
OpenAI node generates structured JSON content
Posts are split by platform (LinkedIn / X)
Posting nodes for LinkedIn and X are in place
The Problems I Need Help With
X (Twitter) node
OAuth 2.0 setup is incomplete
Workflow errors indicate missing or invalid access tokens
Need correct permissions + token flow for posting tweets
LinkedIn node
Profile selection / person field not resolving correctly
OAuth permissions may be missing or misconfigured
Need confirmation of correct LinkedIn API scopes for posting
General workflow cleanup
Validate JSON parsing between OpenAI → split → posting nodes
Ensure platform-specific formatting is reliable
Final test run to confirm scheduled posts work end-to-end
What I’m Looking For
✅ Proven experience with n8n
✅ Strong understanding of OAuth 2.0
✅ Experience working with LinkedIn API and X (Twitter) API
✅ Comfortable debugging live workflows
✅ Can explain what’s wrong and why (not just “fix it”)
Deliverables
Fully working LinkedIn posting via n8n
Fully working X (Twitter) posting via n8n
Correct OAuth configuration documented
Brief explanation of any changes made
Workflow tested and confirmed live
Nice to Have (Bonus)
Suggestions for making the workflow more robust
Experience scaling social automations
Familiarity with AI-generated content pipelines
How to Apply
Please include:
Your experience with n8n
Examples of workflows involving LinkedIn or X posting
Confirmation you understand OAuth troubleshooting
Any questions you have after reviewing the workflow

json.title: AI Workflow Automation Coach — Building Production PMO Pipelines (n8n + Multi-Model APIs)
json.description:
I'm a project manager with 18 years of experience building an automated project management service. I need someone who builds production AI workflows and can teach me to do the same.

What I'm building:

An automated pipeline where:
- Emails and meeting transcripts hit a watched folder
- AI classifies which project they belong to and routes them
- AI extracts relevant data and drafts proposed updates to project trackers/deliverables (.xlsx, PowerPoint, status reports)
- System pauses for human approval before applying changes
- Once approved, deliverables are updated automatically

This is a real product I'm bringing to market, not a personal learning exercise.

What I need from a coach:

1. n8n workflow architecture — folder/email watchers, triggers, branching logic, the human-in-the-loop approval step
2. Multi-model API integration — calling different AI providers per step (DeepSeek/Qwen for cheap classification, frontier models for judgment tasks). I want the pipeline model-agnostic so I can swap providers as pricing and performance change.
3. Structured output — getting AI to return reliable JSON for extraction and classification, not free-form text
4. File manipulation — updating .xlsx trackers and generating presentations programmatically (openpyxl, python-pptx)
5. Cost optimization — choosing the right model tier per task. Help me architect the pipeline so each step uses the cheapest model that can handle it.

About me:
- 18 years PM experience, currently working in biotech/pharma consulting
- Using Claude Code and OpenAI Codex in VS Code daily
- Intermediate with Python (can write scripts with AI assistance)
- Intermediate with n8n (understand the concepts, haven't built a production multi-step pipeline)
- I understand the AI model landscape — I don't need "intro to AI" content

What I'm NOT looking for:
- Prompt engineering tutorials
- ChatGPT/Copilot tips
- Someone who only knows one model/provider
- Theoretical AI architecture — I need someone who has built and deployed real automation workflows

Ideal coach:
- Has built multi-step n8n or similar workflows in production
- Works with multiple AI APIs 
- Can screen-share, build alongside me, and explain why one approach beats another
- Knows the current model landscape 

Format: Video calls, 2-3 hours per week
Budget: $15-25/hr
Timeline: Ongoing, starting February 2026

To apply, tell me:
1. A multi-step AI automation pipeline you've actually built and deployed
2. Which AI model providers you've integrated with (list them)
3. Your experience with n8n specifically (or equivalent orchestration tool)
4. Your availability for weekly sessions

Wedding Industry

Bridal boutiques

Top MBA programs (Harvard, Stanford, Wharton, Booth, INSEAD, etc.)

De-duplication

CRM / Google Sheets / Airtable / Notion (we’ll align on stack)

Lead quality

Conversion signals

Life-defining moments

json.title: n8n automation to monitor Nasdaq IPO page and email alerts
json.description:
Title
n8n automation to monitor Nasdaq IPO page and email alerts

Description
I am looking for an experienced n8n developer to build a simple but reliable automation.

The workflow should run once per day and check the Nasdaq IPO listings page:
https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/ipos

The goal is to detect IPO rows where pricing information is missing and notify me by email.

Core requirements
• Use n8n
• Scheduled workflow that runs one time per day
• Scrape or parse the Nasdaq IPO table
• Identify IPO entries where price or offer amount is blank or missing
• Extract the ticker symbols for those entries and other remaining column entries
• Send an email alert only if at least one match is found

I have tried using AI to guide me on how to reverse engineer these files but have not had any success.

I would like to hire someone experienced at reverse engineering, to provide me a solution that reads these .rsl files and saves the strategies into a parsable format (.txt / .csv etc).

json.title: AI Workflow Automation Coach — Building Production PMO Pipelines (n8n + Multi-Model APIs)

opening.description:
I'm a project manager with 18 years of experience building an automated project management service. I need someone who builds production AI workflows and can teach me to do the same.

What I'm building:

An automated pipeline where:
- Emails and meeting transcripts hit a watched folder
- AI classifies which project they belong to and routes them
- AI extracts relevant data and drafts proposed updates to project trackers/deliverables (.xlsx, PowerPoint, status reports)
- System pauses for human approval before applying changes
- Once approved, deliverables are updated automatically

This is a real product I'm bringing to market, not a personal learning exercise.

What I need from a coach:

1. n8n workflow architecture — folder/email watchers, triggers, branching logic, the human-in-the-loop approval step
2. Multi-model API integration — calling different AI providers per step (DeepSeek/Qwen for cheap classification, frontier models for judgment tasks). I want the pipeline model-agnostic so I can swap providers as pricing and performance change.
3. Structured output — getting AI to return reliable JSON for extraction and classification, not free-form text
4. File manipulation — updating .xlsx trackers and generating presentations programmatically (openpyxl, python-pptx)
5. Cost optimization — choosing the right model tier per task. Help me architect the pipeline so each step uses the cheapest model that can handle it.

About me:
- 18 years PM experience, currently working in biotech/pharma consulting
- Using Claude Code and OpenAI Codex in VS Code daily
- Intermediate with Python (can write scripts with AI assistance)
- Intermediate with n8n (understand the concepts, haven't built a production multi-step pipeline)
- I understand the AI model landscape — I don't need "intro to AI" content

What I'm NOT looking for:
- Prompt engineering tutorials
- ChatGPT/Copilot tips
- Someone who only knows one model/provider
- Theoretical AI architecture — I need someone who has built and deployed real automation workflows

Ideal coach:
- Has built multi-step n8n or similar workflows in production
- Works with multiple AI APIs 
- Can screen-share, build alongside me, and explain why one approach beats another
- Knows the current model landscape 

Format: Video calls, 2-3 hours per week
Budget: $15-25/hr
Timeline: Ongoing, starting February 2026

To apply, tell me:
1. A multi-step AI automation pipeline you've actually built and deployed
2. Which AI model providers you've integrated with (list them)
3. Your experience with n8n specifically (or equivalent orchestration tool)
4. Your availability for weekly sessions

n8n automation to monitor Nasdaq IPO page and email alerts

Description
I am looking for an experienced n8n developer to build a simple but reliable automation.

The workflow should run once per day and check the Nasdaq IPO listings page:
https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/ipos

• Use n8n
• Scheduled workflow that runs one time per day
• Scrape or parse the Nasdaq IPO table
• Identify IPO entries where price or offer amount is blank or missing
• Extract the ticker symbols for those entries and other remaining column entries
• Send an email alert only if at least one match is found

• Email subject should contain the ticker symbols

• Clear explanation of how the workflow works

Nice to have but not required
• Clean error handling if the page structure changes
• Use of HTTP Request node rather than browser automation

json.title: AI Workflow Automation Coach — Building Production PMO Pipelines (n8n + Multi-Model APIs)
json.description:
I'm a project manager with 18 years of experience building an automated project management service. I need someone who builds production AI workflows and can teach me to do the same.

What I'm building:

An automated pipeline where:
- Emails and meeting transcripts hit a watched folder
- AI classifies which project they belong to and routes them
- AI extracts relevant data and drafts proposed updates to project trackers/deliverables (.xlsx, PowerPoint, status reports)
- System pauses for human approval before applying changes
- Once approved, deliverables are updated automatically

This is a real product I'm bringing to market, not a personal learning exercise.

What I need from a coach:

1. n8n workflow architecture — folder/email watchers, triggers, branching logic, the human-in-the-loop approval step
2. Multi-model API integration — calling different AI providers per step (DeepSeek/Qwen for cheap classification, frontier models for judgment tasks). I want the pipeline model-agnostic so I can swap providers as pricing and performance change.
3. Structured output — getting AI to return reliable JSON for extraction and classification, not free-form text
4. File manipulation — updating .xlsx trackers and generating presentations programmatically (openpyxl, python-pptx)
5. Cost optimization — choosing the right model tier per task. Help me architect the pipeline so each step uses the cheapest model that can handle it.

About me:
- 18 years PM experience, currently working in biotech/pharma consulting
- Using Claude Code and OpenAI Codex in VS Code daily
- Intermediate with Python (can write scripts with AI assistance)
- Intermediate with n8n (understand the concepts, haven't built a production multi-step pipeline)
- I understand the AI model landscape — I don't need "intro to AI" content

What I'm NOT looking for:
- Prompt engineering tutorials
- ChatGPT/Copilot tips
- Someone who only knows one model/provider
- Theoretical AI architecture — I need someone who has built and deployed real automation workflows

Ideal coach:
- Has built multi-step n8n or similar workflows in production
- Works with multiple AI APIs

Title
n8n automation to monitor Nasdaq IPO page and email alerts

Description
I am looking for an experienced n8n developer to build a simple but reliable automation.

The workflow should run once per day and check the Nasdaq IPO listings page:
https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/ipos

The goal is to detect IPO rows where pricing information is missing and notify me by email.

Core requirements
• Use n8n
• Scheduled workflow that runs one time per day
• Scrape or parse the Nasdaq IPO table
• Identify IPO entries where price or offer amount is blank or missing
• Extract the ticker symbols for those entries and other remaining column entries
• Send an email alert only if at least one match is found
• Add configuration / filter step. For example filter on a minimum offer amount. 

Email formatting requirements
• Email subject should contain the ticker symbols
• If more than one symbol is found, list them comma separated in the subject
• Email body can include a simple list or table of the affected IPOs

Deliverables
• Fully working n8n workflow (hosted by us) 
• Clear explanation of how the workflow works

Nice to have but not required
• Clean error handling if the page structure changes
• Use of HTTP Request node rather than browser automation

What to include in your proposal
Fixed price budget for this work.
